title: forms — permissions
description: Form authoring gated to admin roles. Public submission requires no permission — the signed session URL IS the auth. Submissions carrying medical / safeguarding classified fields require the equivalent role to read.

permissions.name: forms.update
permissions.description: Metadata + settings + handoff wiring. Schema changes must go through a new FormVersion.

permissions.name: form-versions.rollback
permissions.description: Break-glass revert. Reason REQUIRED. Full audit chain, 7yr retention.

permissions.name: form-submissions.view
permissions.description: Sensitivity-gated: medical fields blur unless viewer has medical.viewAny.

permissions.name: form-submissions.download
permissions.description: Full-body download. Logs to audit trail.

permissions.name: form-submissions.export
permissions.description: Bulk PII export. AlertOnBulkPiiExport fires above threshold.

permissions.name: form-submissions.delete
permissions.description: GDPR erasure path — replaces answers with tombstone. Full audit chain.

permissions.name: platform.forms.audit
permissions.description: Cross-tenant form-schema audit + submission volume analytics.

permissions.name: platform.forms.gdpr-erasure
permissions.description: Force GDPR erasure across a tenant's submissions.
